since_last: 53% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +4.74%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 53% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.19% · BTC -0.25% · Gold +1.33% · Nasdaq100 -1.09%. 53% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +4.74%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +4.74%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.52%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -8.96%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +7.99%, DV +7.19%, PUBM +6.86%, APP +6.76%, WDAY +6.52%. Laggards: TER -8.96%, VRT -7.41%, NXPI -7.16%, HPE -6.65%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.53% at $152.18
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.53% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
